hero.title: At LabelAlly Entertainment,
hero.description: We empower creators, businesses, and brands with end-to-end digital, media, and technology solutions. From music distribution to business growth strategies, we provide everything you need to succeed in the digital world.

list.heading: Professional Capabilities
list.description: Explore our specialized services designed to protect your intellectual property, expand your reach, and optimize your catalog's revenue potential.

items.title: Music Distribution
items.description: Deliver your tracks, albums, and music videos directly to all major streaming platforms worldwide. We handle digital supply chain management, store onboarding, and automated metadata delivery.

items.title: YouTube Channel Management
items.description: Comprehensive channel administration including content upload schedules, metadata optimization, custom playlist creation, card/end-screen annotation, and direct fan engagement strategies.

items.title: Content Rights Management
items.description: Protect your content on global platforms. We monitor, enforce, and manage digital licensing agreements to ensure your copyrights are protected from unauthorized use and monetization.

items.title: YouTube CMS & Content ID
items.description: Audit and claim royalties across user-generated content (UGC) on YouTube. We configure matching policies, manage standard assets, resolve ownership conflicts, and maximize Content ID revenue.

items.title: OTT Distribution
items.description: Expand your reach onto over-the-top media platforms. We format and deliver video content to smart TV applications, streaming sticks, and digital television networks.

items.title: Revenue Optimization
items.description: Audit and streamline multi-channel payouts. We resolve payout discrepancies, optimize digital streams reporting, and consolidate mechanicals, performance, and sync licensing collection.

items.title: Artist & Label Support
items.description: Dedicated account management and strategic guidance for artists and labels. We provide personalized support to help you navigate the music industry landscape.

items.title: Digital Promotion
items.description: Strategic marketing campaigns across social media, streaming platforms, and digital channels. We help you reach wider audiences and grow your fanbase effectively.

items.title: Content Monetization
items.description: Maximize your revenue through multiple monetization channels. We optimize your content for maximum earnings across all platforms and distribution networks.

image.alt: LabelAlly team collaborating on music distribution and creator services

steps.title: Connect With Us
steps.description: Reach out to discuss your music distribution, rights management, or channel optimization needs.

steps.title: Share Your Requirements
steps.description: Provide details about your catalog, channels, and specific goals for your music or content.

steps.title: Onboarding & Setup
steps.description: We configure your distribution, rights management, or channel services with proper metadata and assets.

steps.title: Distribution & Service Activation
steps.description: Your content goes live across platforms with rights protection and monetization enabled.

steps.title: Reporting & Ongoing Support
steps.description: Receive transparent reporting and dedicated support to optimize your revenue and growth.

partnersSection.heading: Available Across Leading Digital Platforms
partnersSection.description: LabelAlly helps distribute and manage content across leading digital and streaming platforms used by artists, labels, and creators.

cta.heading: Ready to Optimize Your Music?
cta.description: Partner with us today. Reach out to get started with distribution, channel management, or rights auditing.

primaryCta.label: Get in Touch
primaryCta.ariaLabel: Get in touch — contact our services onboarding team
